cohort.failure_retention: Every selected session remains one manifest row; failures use status=failed and retain error fields.

binning.valid_mask: audited pinned-BWM-equivalent inclusive min_rt=0.08/max_rt=2/default-NaN mask after explicit full-table no-truncation precondition AND finite view event AND each probe conservative observed-good-spike support; this is not claimed to be a recording interval
binning.csv_timing_valid_relation: Each view CSV timing_valid is bit-identical to its NPZ *_valid vector.

hidden_context_isolation.stimulus_side: Binary safe gate observation after fail-closed XOR-finite/no-inf contrast validation; convention finite contrastLeft maps to 1 and finite contrastRight maps to 0, preserving side on zero-contrast trials and matching exp11/HMM.
hidden_context_isolation.block_id: floor(trial_id/50), fixed_trial_id_chunks_v1 for chronological CV only; never a task-context label

nuisance_semantics.wheel: total absolute wheel displacement from stimulus onset inclusive to response exclusive, sum of absolute first differences; only lagged use is causal-safe pre-stim; timestamp and position UUID/name/MD5 are recorded
nuisance_semantics.motion_energy_proxy: finite-sample arithmetic mean of camera ROI motion energy in the view-specific half-open pre-event window; camera-time and energy UUID/name/MD5 are recorded; this is not DLC pose

unit_qc.official_attempt: Acquisition-only pinned brainwidemap.bwm_loading.load_good_units receipt, revision 2024-05-06, qc=1.0; compact performs no ONE or official-loader call
unit_qc.acquisition_receipts: List sorted by source_record.probe_name then PID; each item is exactly {source_record:<unaltered variable-schema acquisition record>,source_record_sha256:<canonical SHA-256 of source_record>}; validate exact variable keys for passed, failed, or official_good_unit_loader_skipped_missing_inventory by source_record.event
unit_qc.complete_session_method: Every complete compact session uses the repair/equivalence method regardless of acquisition receipt pass/fail; receipts are non-authoritative provenance
unit_qc.repair_assertion: sorted unique passingSpikes.cluster IDs exactly equal sorted clusters.metrics cluster_id with label>=1
unit_qc.equivalence_hash_payload: Top-level dict {sorting_rule:'probe_name_then_pid_then_cluster_id_v1',probes:[...]}; probes explicitly sorted by probe_name then PID, cluster rows ascending, and each probe binds sorted passing IDs, sorted label>=1 IDs, cluster/channel/CCF/acronym mapping, and UUID+MD5 of passingSpikes, metrics, clusters.channels and channels.brainLocationIds datasets

official_bwm_mask.no_truncation_precondition: full table requires n_trials>400 and easy-trial performance>0.9, where easy is abs(signed contrast percent)>=50

region_mapping.lookup: unique integer id to nonempty acronym; signed CCF IDs use abs; complete coverage required

dataset_failure_policy.camera_rule: first intact time+ROI-motion-energy pair in fixed left,right,body priority; absence of any intact pair is required failure
dataset_failure_policy.auxiliary_rule: Every other inventory dataset, including clusters.waveforms.npy, is auxiliary_nonblocking_not_read; exact acquisition failures remain receipt-bound for every session
dataset_failure_policy.symmetry: The same name/pair rule is applied to all 20 sessions; any required failure makes that session status=failed
dataset_failure_policy.required_input_bundle: Every checked compact dataset is role-tracked as full {dataset_uuid,name,md5,roles}; the canonical tracked bundle must exactly equal the preregistered trial+wheel+selected-camera+four-per-probe input set

review_gate.acquisition_external_side_effect: Final logs/download.log SHA and both observed external Allen-cache download markers are approval-bound; external files are never read or hashed as compact inputs and used_by_compact=false.
